title: Installer for Battle.net hangs at 88-89%
author: SiraLJ
body:
**Operating System:** openSUSE Tumbleweed-Slowroll 20260707
**Installation type:** Native (link in Discover app: appstream://faugus-launcher.desktop)

**What I did**
1. Installing Faugus Launcher
2. End session  (computer was shutdown for the night)
3. Install Battle.net
4. Proton-CachyOS installs, Steam Runtime installs
5. Battle.net installer initialises
6. Actual Battle.net installer starts
7. Slows down after ~80%
8. Hangs for 3-4 minutes

Scenario 1: Installer reaches 100% but login screen doesn't show (Recorded)
Scenario 2: Hangs until closed by it self (around 5 min. mark)

**Result in both scenarios**
1. The "Play" icon changes to "Stop" icon (as expected)
2. Attempting to launch Battle.Net after (failed) installation starts initialising Pronton and Steam runtime
3. The Battle.net agent icon is displayed briefly (blink and you'll miss it)
4. The "Stop" icon changes back to "Play" after ~30 seconds (Unexpected)

**What I also tried**

- Starting the Battle.net app again
- Reinstalling (removing prefix during uninstall)
- Restarted Faugus and reinstalled (removing prefix during uninstall)


**Recording of installation**

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fc38ce33-a719-43b2-afb8-29fc4738312c


**Recording of run attempt (see timestamp 7-9 sec. for the Battle.net agent icon in task view)**

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6cd294c4-9b97-453d-9c8c-ff669f50ad2b

title: admin installer turnoff?
author: PengwinLove
body: im very new to this but i not been able to figure out if im being stupid or if this is a issue for real i don't see a reason for a installer to ask to not be run in admin mode but it is asking to not be so?

title: "webview2 not available" error
author: joetv4321-crypto
body: Really this maybe more of a question. I understood that FL takes care of all steam game requirements. After using it successfully to launch a few games on Fedora (yay!) I tried to run a game that I downloaded actually using the steam platform. Steam is running in a Windows 11 VM under Fedora, and both OSs share a drive via samba. After coniguring the game to access the .exe, this particular game gives a "Webview2 is not installed, you may download it from..." error. Perhaps my use case is unusual, or it's just my noobness with FL. Any help you can give with this is appreciated. If FL doesn't support webview2 or there's no workaround, that's fine, I'll just revert to running the (free) game in the VM. Thanks for your consideration.

title: Steam shortcut not available to all accounts
author: Mohammad-X-Akbari
body:
Launcher Version 1.22.8 | rpm build | Fedora 44 KDE

There's a minor bug where the Steam shortcut option would only add the shortcut to the first steam account's library. No matter which account is selected on steam, it's only available to the first one. 
An option to choose the account or even adding the shortcut to all accounts would be great. 

Also thanks for your great work! Really nice and solid Launcher.

title: Battle.net installer fails with "Unhandled page fault on read access" errors during initial setup
author: osy999
body: Context: Battlenet path: /mnt/ssd/faugus/ TSM path: /mnt/ssd/faugus-tsm/ I wanted to install [TradeSkillMaster](https://tradeskillmaster.com/) on CachyOS, so I created a new prefix to hold this app because it requires wine-staging, but I was stupid enough to not know wine is system wide and not per prefix, and I eventually replaced my system's wine with wine-staging After installing wine-staging, I realized my Battlenet cant boot up anymore, and had memory leak issue which would OOM my entire OS. So I deleted /mnt/ssd/faugus-tsm/, I replaced wine-staging with wine ``` ❯ pacman -Q | grep -i wine wine 11.12-1.1 wine-cachyos-opt 2:10.0.20260425-1 winetricks 20260125-2 ``` Tried starting Battlenet, no luck, still not starting up and is OOMing my entire OS. Tried installing Battlenet from faugus-launcher And I get these errors ``` ❯ faugus-launcher /usr/lib/python3.14/site-packages/faugus/launcher.py:98: DeprecationWarning: Gtk.Window.set_wmclass is deprecated self.set_wmclass("faugus-launcher", "faugus-launcher") Faugus Launcher 1.22.8 === ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES === DRI_PRIME=1 LOG_DIR=battlenet PROTONFIXES_DISABLE=1 PROTONPATH=Proton-CachyOS Latest PROTON_BATTLEYE_RUNTIME=/home/owl/.config/faugus-launcher/components/be PROTON_EAC_RUNTIME=/home/owl/.config/faugus-launcher/components/eac PROTON_ENABLE_WAYLAND=0 UMU_CONTAINER_NSENTER=1 UMU_USE_STEAM=1 WINEPREFIX=/mnt/ssd/faugus/battlenet WINE_SIMULATE_WRITECOPY=1 === UMU-LAUNCHER COMMAND === /home/owl/.local/share/faugus-launcher/umu-run /home/owl/.local/share/faugus-launcher/faugus_temp/Battle.net-Setup.exe '--installpath=C:\Program Files (x86)\Battle.net' --lang=enUS /usr/lib/python3.14/site-packages/faugus/runner.py:498: DeprecationWarning: Gtk.Window.set_wmclass is deprecated self.splash_window.set_wmclass("faugus-launcher", "faugus-launcher") UMU-Launcher is up to date. Components are up to date. Proton-CachyOS is up to date. INFO: umu-launcher version 1.4.1 (3.14.6 (main, Jun 23 2026, 18:14:05) [GCC 16.1.1 20260430]) INFO: No GAMEID set, using umu-default INFO: steamrt4 is up to date INFO: Failed to find bus name com.steampowered.App240b78de75e666eaa7e8b9005d914f5f (retry 1) INFO: Failed to find bus name com.steampowered.App240b78de75e666eaa7e8b9005d914f5f (retry 2) INFO: Failed to find bus name com.steampowered.App240b78de75e666eaa7e8b9005d914f5f (retry 3) INFO: Failed to find bus name com.steampowered.App240b78de75e666eaa7e8b9005d914f5f (retry 4) INFO: Failed to find bus name com.steampowered.App240b78de75e666eaa7e8b9005d914f5f (retry 5) INFO: Running 'Proton-CachyOS Latest' using runtime 'steamrt4' INFO: Running 'steamrt4' using runtime 'host' setlocale "en_GB.UTF-8": No such file or directory pv-locale-gen: Missing locale en_GB.UTF-8 (found in $LC_TIME) pv-locale-gen: Generating locale ms_MY.UTF-8... pv-locale-gen: Generated locale ms_MY.UTF-8 successfully pv-locale-gen: Generating locale en_GB.UTF-8... pv-locale-gen: Generated locale en_GB.UTF-8 successfully pv-locale-gen: Generating locale en_US.UTF-8... pv-locale-gen: Generated locale en_US.UTF-8 successfully pv-adverb[262258]: W: Container startup will be faster if missing locales are created at OS level ProtonFixes[262332] WARN: Skipping fix execution. We are probably running a unit test. ProtonFixes[262332] WARN: Skipping fix execution. We are probably running a unit test. Starting program with command-launcher service. To run commands in the per-app container, use a command like: /home/owl/.local/share/umu/steamrt4/pressure-vessel/bin/steam-runtime-launch-client \ --bus-name=:1.288 \ -- \ bash ntsync: up and running. wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 0000000000000018 at address 00006FFFFEA2D229 (thread 0050), starting debugger... wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 000000000000036E at address 00006FFFFDCB7537 (thread 006c), starting debugger... **(it repeatedly show this error until it OOMs my entire OS)** ``` Tried downloading a new Battle.net installer from Battle.net, I get similar logs ``` ❯ faugus-launcher /usr/lib/python3.14/site-packages/faugus/launcher.py:98: DeprecationWarning: Gtk.Window.set_wmclass is deprecated self.set_wmclass("faugus-launcher", "faugus-launcher") Faugus Launcher 1.22.8 === ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES === DRI_PRIME=1 FAUGUSID=battlenet LOG_DIR=battlenet PROTONFIXES_DISABLE=1 PROTONPATH=Proton-CachyOS Latest PROTON_BATTLEYE_RUNTIME=/home/owl/.config/faugus-launcher/components/be PROTON_EAC_RUNTIME=/home/owl/.config/faugus-launcher/components/eac SPLASHICON=/home/owl/.config/faugus-launcher/icons/battlenet.png UMU_CONTAINER_NSENTER=1 UMU_USE_STEAM=1 WINEPREFIX=/mnt/ssd/faugus/battlenet === UMU-LAUNCHER COMMAND === /home/owl/.local/share/faugus-launcher/umu-run /mnt/ssd/Battle.net-Setup.exe /usr/lib/python3.14/site-packages/faugus/runner.py:498: DeprecationWarning: Gtk.Window.set_wmclass is deprecated self.splash_window.set_wmclass("faugus-launcher", "faugus-launcher") UMU-Launcher is up to date. We are probably running a unit test. ProtonFixes[275057] WARN: Skipping fix execution. We are probably running a unit test. Starting program with command-launcher service. To run commands in the per-app container, use a command like: /home/owl/.local/share/umu/steamrt4/pressure-vessel/bin/steam-runtime-launch-client \ --bus-name=:1.327 \ -- \ bash ntsync: up and running. wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 0000000000000018 at address 00006FFFFEA2D229 (thread 0050), starting debugger... wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 000000000000036E at address 00006FFFFDCB7537 (thread 006c), starting debugger... wine: Unhandled page fault on read access to 000000000000036E at address 00006FFFFDCB7537 (thread 00a8), starting debugger... ``` I use CachyOS, my faugus-launcher is installed from pacman. title: [Request] Window Resize for "List" Interface Mode
author: kajoken
body:
Hello. 

First, thank you again for this fantastic launcher and thanks for your help over on reddit. I already switched a lot of stuff over to Faugus and everything works fine.

I'd like to request the feature to resize the Faugus Launcher main window when Interface Mode is set to "List". At the moment you can only resize the window when set to "Blocks" and "Banners". Trying to resize with "List" shows the resize arrows but moving them does nothing.

This feature would be greatly appreciated since I'd like to stretch the window to fit more entries on the main window.

Thank you in advance if you could consider this. :)

title: Can't add game to Steam
author: hallowieners
body:
System: Steam Deck, Steam OS 3.8.14

Faugus from the Discover store, version 1.22.8-1

The issue is I'm unable to add new applications as a Steam shortcut, the option is greyed out and it says Steam needs to be restarted, and no users found.

I tried reapplying the flatpak permissions mentioned on this github page with no luck.
I was able to add steam shortcuts in the past but I'm not sure what changed besides me updating to SteamOS 3.8 within the past two weeks.

title: Updating to umu-launcher 1.4.1
author: buster-biopsys
body:
Keep in mind that Faugus Launcher is basically a GUI for umu-launcher.
umu-launcher runs Windows games using Proton only and does not support Wine.
So please do not ask for support for emulators or Wine.

A new version of umu-launcher released! 🎉

Would be nice to see a new update for Faugus updating this component. Since it comes with new bugfixes and adresses some issues that some users had.

As always, thanks for your work, Faugus.

title: Add support for custom covers and banners via SteamGridDB
author: Lamarcke
body: Hey, first and foremost, thanks for the hard work. I want to suggest adding a way to use custom covers and banners using teh SteamGridDB integration. This would be specially helpful when adding Faugus games to Steam, because otherwise only the icon is available. This feature would require the user to add a SteamGrid API key, but it's very simple to get one. Heroic also has this feature, and this is how it looks on their side: And how it looks when imported to Steam: (It's possible to select both the cover (used as icon) and banner art this way) Thanks.

title: Diablo IV fails to launch on Season 14 after trying multiple Proton versions (Experimental, bleeding-edge, Hotfix)
author: robertocattolico-collab
body:
Since the Season 14 patch, Diablo IV crashes immediately on launch through Faugus Launcher (Battle.net). This appears related to the known FindNextFileNameW issue affecting Linux/Proton users this season.
I've tried the following without success:

Proton Experimental (stable)
Proton Experimental (bleeding-edge)
Proton Hotfix

All set specifically for Diablo IV via Faugus's per-game Proton settings, with Battle.net itself also configured to match. Other Battle.net titles (D2R, Starcraft 2, Warcraft 3) launch fine.
Setup: CachyOS, Cosmic DE, NVIDIA RTX 3060.
Is this expected to be resolved purely on Blizzard's end, or could there be something specific to how Faugus/UMU-Launcher passes the selected Proton version to this particular game?

title: VRR flicker in fullscreen
author: PCBscanner
body:
When in fullscreen mode I get a mild flicker as the refresh rate flips between 59/60 → 240 Hz (verified with the OSD on my OLED monitor). This stays locked at 240 Hz when not in fullscreen and no flickering occurs. I’m using the “Automatic” mode in the KDE settings, and the same occurs with “Always” (as I’d expect). I’m unsure if this is something that needs to be implemented into the application itself or something that needs to be done on KDE's side.

Version 1.22.7-1, CachyOS, KDE Plasma, NVIDIA 610.43.02, everything else seems up-to-date.

Fullscreen + banners looks great otherwise - good work!

title: Settings menu not recognized as dialogue window in Wayland
author: NathanTJFA
body:
Desktop: KDE Plasma 6.7.2
Distro: CachyOS
Package: System Package
Faugus Lancher Version: 1.22.7

I use KDE Plasma with a tiling extension called Krohnkite. Krohnkite will automatically make windows float if they are a dialogue or utility window. On X11 and XWayland the Settings, Proton Manager, and File Picker (E.G. when selecting a game path) are all float. On Wayland they do not. There are some things like the spinning window that pops up when clicking winetricks or winecfg that doesn't float on X11 or Wayland, while the new app/game and edit windows always float. I've only made apps in QT and am not familiar with GTK so I don't know why this happens here.

title: AUR pkgbuild can't be downloaded
author: chantrykomori
body:
```
yay -q faugus
3 aur/game-icon-fixer-git r1.0ae2a35-1 (+0 0.00) [92d11h] 
    A clever GTK4/Libadwaita application to fix and manage Steam and Faugus Launcher desktop shortcut icons on Wayland.
2 aur/faugus-launcher-git r1374.c9b61a8-1 (+9 0.05) [45d11h] 
    A simple and lightweight app for running Windows games using UMU-Launcher
1 aur/faugus-launcher 1.22.7-1 (+59 30.64) [1d14h] 
    A simple and lightweight app for running Windows games using UMU-Launcher
==> Packages to install (eg: 1 2 3, 1-3 or ^4)
==> 1
Sync Dependency (3): python-pygame-2.6.1-5, icoextract-0.3.0-1, python-requests-2.34.2-1
Sync Make Dependency (1): meson-1.11.1-3
AUR Explicit (1): faugus-launcher-1.22.7-1
:: (0/1) Failed to download PKGBUILD: faugus-launcher
 -> error fetching faugus-launcher: fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git 
         context: exit status 128
```
Installed this about a week ago through the AUR no prob, had to rebuild my system in between then and now, but it looks like something upstream of me has gone wrong

title: Add back Epic?
author: alex-martel
body:
For me latest epic works great with faugus. If you were refering to the problem where epic seems unable to update the "Epic Online Services".

To solve it I used the solution on this reddit thread; https://www.reddit.com/r/cachyos/comments/1tqfxyk/epic_games_online_services_update_loop/

```
What helped me was to delete the folder "Epic Online Services" (usually located in the path C:\Program Files (x86)\Epic Games), run the EG Launcher and then the installation was successful. 
```

I went into the prefix, deleted the folder above, restarted epic games, then it installed the online services thing ok.

Above was tested on steamdeck.

I also tried a fresh installation of epic games. Right after install, it does an update, which then tries to unsuccessfully update that same component, did the same thing and then it worked opk.

Thanks.

title: Cant add titles to steam (installed as flatpak user) as far as i can see hgl added them for every user except 0 thats why it worked sry but u locked the thread
author: givname
body:
i read about permissions 
# Allow Faugus Launcher to detect Steam users and games
sudo flatpak override io.github.Faugus.faugus-launcher --filesystem=~/.var/app/com.valvesoftware.Steam/
sudo flatpak override io.github.Faugus.faugus-launcher --talk-name=org.freedesktop.Flatpak

# Allow Steam to run Faugus Launcher shortcuts
sudo flatpak override com.valvesoftware.Steam --talk-name=org.freedesktop.Flatpak

# Allow Steam to see Faugus Launcher games icons
sudo flatpak override com.valvesoftware.Steam --filesystem=~/.var/app/io.github.Faugus.faugus-launcher/config/faugus-launcher/
sudo flatpak override com.valvesoftware.Steam --filesystem=~/.config/faugus-launcher/

but theese seem to be flatpak to flatpak specific. Since i run faugus as flatpak and steam not i dont see a problem here, also tried enabling all file acces via flatseal but adding to steam is still greyed out. When staring faugus via konsole it does not show anything useful. What can i do?

title: CLI flag to set config location
author: Andstar
body:
Faugus launcher by default uses ~/.config/faugus-launcher as the directory for storing settings, banners etc. 
I would like to see the ability to set other config folders for different app profiles (for example to have one quick profile to run in compact mode for wine-only apps with useful envvars and another in banner mode for e.g. Battle.net and Epic Games)
The command could look like this:
- faugus-launcher --config-location "/your/custom/faugus-launcher-config"

or
- $CONFIG_LOCATION="/your/custom/faugus-launcher-config" faugus-launcher
